item.title: Sexy Stars Sippin' Margaritas for National Margarita Day
item.description: If the February cold is getting you down, it might be time to follow the example of these stars ... and mix yourself a marg on National Margarita Day!...

item.title: Celebrity Scramble -- Guess The Tequila-Sippin' Hottie
item.description: It's National Margarita Day, so we're serving up a Hollywood hottie who knows her tequila. Toss back these clues and see if you can spit out the celeb...

item.title: Master P Says Colleges Are Blowing Up His Phone To Run Their Basketball Program
item.description: President of Basketball Ops today … head coach tomorrow? Master P isn’t ruling it out. The rap mogul-turned-basketball exec swung by the TMZ Sports st...

item.title: Snowboard and Ski Apparel for Powder Days

item.title: Rihanna Good Genes or Good Docs?!
item.description: Rihanna's looks over the years shine bright like a diamond 💎! Here is a 17-year-old version of the Barbados singer at Jay-Z's "The Teen People Listeni...
